evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Deliver projects safely, on time, and cost effectively while upholding IT governance, GMP/HSE, and compliance standards (COPs, SOPs); ensuring quality, lineage, and reliability
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Classified as rigour because 'GMP/HSE, compliance standards', 'IT governance', 'data governance', 'safe-by-design practices', and 'quality, lineage, and reliability' dominate the responsibilities — no velocity signals present.
evidence.domain_risk: pharmaceutical CDMO; GMP/HSE and compliance standards (COPs, SOPs) explicitly named in responsibilities
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Classified as high because Hovione is a regulated pharmaceutical CDMO where GMP compliance is an explicit named responsibility, placing this in the highly regulated healthcare sector with direct patient safety implications.
evidence.data_team_maturity: build, standardize, and maintain reporting and self-service analytics as part of data lake and data mesh concepts
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Classified as mid because 'data lake and data mesh concepts' implies existing infrastructure being extended, and 'build and standardize' signals a growing function, not a first hire or enterprise-scale mature organisation.
evidence.jd_authorship: Preprocess and engineer features from structured and unstructured data, ensuring quality, lineage, and reliability; set up monitoring, alerting, and lifecycle management; upholding IT governance, GMP/HSE, and compliance standards (COPs, SOPs)
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Classified as mixed because specific technical responsibilities (feature engineering, lineage, monitoring, GMP compliance) sit alongside generic bullets ('partner with stakeholders across functions as a data business partner').
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: self-service business intelligence across the company; support metrics, analytics, AI/machine learning
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Classified as internal_data because the primary outputs are self-service BI, analytics infrastructure, and data products serving internal functions across the company, not a named external or commercial audience.
evidence.autonomy_level: Strong autonomy to lead analytic solutions from design to deployment; deliver projects safely, on time
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Classified as mixed because 'strong autonomy to lead analytic solutions from design to deployment' signals strategic ownership while 'deliver projects safely, on time' within GMP compliance frameworks signals execution.
evidence.ai_role: Apply database modelling and design principles to support metrics, analytics, AI/machine learning
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Classified as ai_enabler because the candidate builds data architecture and models that support AI/machine learning systems — the AI is downstream of the candidate's output.
evidence.testing_framing: ensuring quality, lineage, and reliability; set up monitoring, alerting, and lifecycle management; upholding IT governance, GMP/HSE, and compliance standards
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Classified as responsibility because 'ensuring quality, lineage, and reliability' and 'set up monitoring, alerting' with GMP compliance framing makes data quality assurance a primary owned accountability.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Deliver projects safely, on time, and cost effectively while upholding IT governance, GMP/HSE, and compliance standards (COPs, SOPs)
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Classified as high because GMP/HSE compliance, COPs/SOPs, and 'safe-by-design practices' are named obligations in a pharmaceutical manufacturing context — regulatory exposure and patient safety are the primary risk framings.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: build, standardize, and maintain reporting; implement models and data products
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Classified as mixed because the role involves both building new analytics capabilities (greenfield) and standardising/maintaining existing reporting infrastructure (fix_scale).
evidence.language_gate: Portuguese proficiency strongly preferred (ability to engage stakeholders in both languages)
evidence.loss_aversion: upholding IT governance, GMP/HSE, and compliance standards (COPs, SOPs) — regulatory compliance and safe-by-design practices are primary framings in a regulated pharmaceutical manufacturing context.
